productDisplayName: Red Chief Men Brown Formal Shoes
description: Style NoteLend a new season twist to your wardrobe with this pair of red chief shoes. Crafted from the highest quality leather (that's also recyclable!) which won't burn a hole in your pocket - this is your go-to option for comfy leather footwear!Product DetailsBrown square toed slip-on shoe with overlays, stitched detailing at the seams of the toe boxElasticated gussets on the sides of the tonguePadded tongue and innerOutsole adhered to the upper for durabilityThick TPU outsole with patterned grooves and a stacked heelMaterial and CareLeatherWipe with clean dry cloth to remove dustDo not store under direct sunlight
